# Waktu+ - Malaysian Prayer Times App

## Overview
Waktu+ is a comprehensive Islamic prayer times application designed for Muslims in Malaysia. It provides accurate prayer times based on JAKIM (Jabatan Kemajuan Islam Malaysia) data for all zones across Malaysia.

## Features

### Prayer Times
- Real-time prayer times for all Malaysian zones (Fajr/Subuh, Sunrise/Syuruk, Dhuhr/Zohor, Asr/Asar, Maghrib, Isha/Isyak)
- Prayer countdown timer showing time until next prayer
- Monthly prayer timetable view
- Automatic zone detection based on location
- Support for 46 prayer zones across Malaysia

### Al-Quran
- Complete Quran with 114 Surahs and 30 Juz
- Arabic text with transliteration and translation
- Multiple language support (English and Malay)
- Daily verse feature

### Islamic Calendar
- Important Islamic dates for 2026 based on JAKIM Malaysia
- Countdown to upcoming Islamic events
- Events include: Isra Mi'raj, Ramadan, Nuzul al-Quran, Eid al-Fitr, Eid al-Adha, Islamic New Year, Maulidur Rasul

### Waktu+ Display
- Full-screen display mode for mosques and suraus
- Live prayer times with large typography
- Azan alerts and Iqamah countdown
- Friday/Jumaah khutbah alerts
- Customizable title and settings

### Localization
- Bilingual support: English and Bahasa Malaysia
- Localized prayer names, dates, and UI elements
- Islamic date display in Hijri calendar format

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js and React
- Progressive Web App (PWA) support
- Responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Real-time updates with automatic refresh

## API Endpoints
- /api/prayer - Prayer times data from JAKIM
- /api/quran - Quran data from alquran.cloud API
- /api/locate - Geolocation-based zone detection

## Contact
Website: https://waktuplus.vercel.app
